title: KISSPEPTIN
description: Kisspeptin is a neuropeptide that plays a crucial role in reproductive hormone regulation. It stimulates GnRH release, which triggers the production of LH and FSH. Research explores its use for fertility, hypogonadism, and hormone optimization.

research.title: Kisspeptin and its Current Clinical Status- A Systematic Review
research.summary: Kisspeptin is presented as a multipurpose drug with fewer side effects, promoting normal physiological processes in various conditions.

research.title: Kisspeptin and Polycystic Ovary Syndrome
research.summary: Research indicates higher kisspeptin levels in PCOS women, suggesting an overactive KISS1 system may contribute to irregular menstrual cycles.

research.title: Potential roles for the kisspeptin/kisspeptin receptor system in implantation and placentation
research.summary: Kisspeptins and KISS1R play crucial roles in implantation and placentation, with levels potentially serving as diagnostic markers.

research.title: The kisspeptin-GnRH pathway in human reproductive health and disease
research.summary: Kisspeptin plays a key role in human reproduction; manipulating its signaling may offer novel therapies.

research.title: The role of kisspeptin in the control of gonadotrophin secretion
research.summary: Kisspeptins regulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis and reproduction, integrating signals from internal and external sources.

research.title: There is Kisspeptin – And Then There is Kisspeptin
research.summary: Kisspeptin regulates glucose homeostasis, insulin secretion, food intake, and body composition.

research.title: Kisspeptin-54 stimulates the hypothalamic-pituitary gonadal axis in human males
research.summary: Elevating kisspeptin-54 significantly increases circulating LH, FSH, and testosterone levels in human males.

sentiment.summary: Limited user reports as it's primarily used in clinical/research settings. Those using for hormone optimization report mixed results. More commonly discussed in fertility contexts.

effects.label: Clinical Applications:
effects.description: Primary use in clinical fertility treatment.

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Often used in pulsatile fashion to mimic physiology.

sideEffects.label: Limited Data:
sideEffects.description: Safety profile in recreational use not well established.

availability.label: Specialized Use:
availability.description: Not as commonly available as other peptides.
